description: Analyze five years (2019-2023) of bird survey data from ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/wetland_bird_surveys.csv to determine species richness, Shannon-Wiener diversity (H'), and Simpson's diversity (D) for each of the 12 sites. Identify population trends for increasing and declining species and rank the sites by diversity to distinguish the most degraded and pristine locations. Save the analysis to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/wetland_diversity_analysis.xlsx

metadata.data_source: Simulated Upper Mississippi River Floodplain Surveys
